skill.name: image-enhancer
skill.description: Improves screenshots and digital images by enhancing resolution, sharpness, clarity, and compression quality for documentation, presentations, and social media.
skill.summary: Enhances screenshots and images for clearer sharing, publishing, and presentation use.
skill.author: DYAI2025

security_audit.summary: The 13 external command detections are false positives from Markdown code fences containing prompt examples at SKILL.md lines 31 through 64. The weak cryptographic algorithm detection at SKILL.md:3 is also a false positive because the line is descriptive text and contains no cryptographic code. No prompt injection, network access, secret access, executable script, or data exfiltration evidence was found.

content.value_statement: Low quality screenshots and images can reduce the clarity of documentation, reports, and social posts. This skill guides Claude, Codex, or Claude Code to improve resolution, sharpness, artifacts, and output format.
actual_capabilities: Reviews image quality for resolution, sharpness, and compression artifacts.
Guides enhancement of screenshots and digital images for clearer text and edges.
Supports upscaling requests, including high resolution presentation targets.
Describes batch enhancement workflows for image folders and PNG files.
Recommends output formats for quality, smaller files, or platform-specific sharing.
Encourages preserving original files before creating enhanced versions.
limitations: It provides workflow guidance and depends on available image editing tools.
It cannot recover detail that is absent from the original image.
Large batch jobs may require significant processing time and storage.
Results vary by input quality, file format, and enhancement settings.

use_cases.title: Prepare Documentation Screenshots
use_cases.description: Improve UI screenshots so labels, controls, and interface details are easier to read.

use_cases.title: Polish Presentation Images
use_cases.description: Upscale and sharpen images before placing them on large slides or reports.

use_cases.title: Optimize Social Media Assets
use_cases.description: Enhance image clarity and choose suitable output settings for publishing platforms.

prompt_templates.title: Enhance One Screenshot
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a single file.
prompt_templates.prompt: Improve the quality of screenshot.png. Preserve the original file and create an enhanced copy.

prompt_templates.title: Sharpen Blurry Text
prompt_templates.scenario: Focused improvement for readable interface captures.
prompt_templates.prompt: Sharpen this blurry screenshot and optimize it for documentation. Prioritize readable text and clean edges.

prompt_templates.title: Prepare for Presentation
prompt_templates.scenario: Image needs to look clear on large screens.
prompt_templates.prompt: Upscale this image for a presentation slide. Improve clarity without creating visible artifacts.

prompt_templates.title: Batch Optimize Folder
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced workflow for multiple related assets.
prompt_templates.prompt: Enhance all PNG files in this directory for a blog post. Keep originals, reduce artifacts, and save optimized copies.

output_examples.input: Improve the image quality of screenshot-2024.png.
output_examples.output: The skill would review resolution, blur, and artifacts, then produce an enhanced copy with clearer text and sharper edges.

output_examples.input: Enhance all images in this folder for a product guide.
output: Enhanced versions are created with consistent naming.
Images are optimized for readable documentation.

output_examples.output: The skill would improve clarity and recommend output settings suitable for social media sharing.

best_practices: Keep original images unchanged and save enhanced copies with clear names.
State the target use case, such as web, print, presentation, or social media.
Review enhanced images visually before publishing or sharing them.
anti_patterns: Do not overwrite original image files without a verified backup.
Do not apply heavy sharpening when natural image quality is more important.
Do not expect enhancement to recreate missing details from very low quality sources.

faq.question: What image types does this skill describe?
faq.answer: It focuses on screenshots and digital images used in documentation, presentations, reports, and social media.

faq.question: Can it process a whole folder?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes prompts for enhancing all images or all PNG files in a directory.

faq.question: Does it preserve originals?
faq.answer: The skill recommends keeping original files as backups before saving enhanced versions.

faq.question: Can it improve blurry screenshots?
faq.answer: It can guide sharpening and clarity improvements, but results depend on the source image quality.

faq.question: Can it prepare images for social media?
faq.answer: Yes. It suggests mentioning the platform so sizing and format choices can match the publishing target.

faq.question: Does it include executable code?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed skill file is documentation-only and contains prompt examples, not executable scripts.
